description_long: This is a modern bunk bed with a white metal frame and two stacked sleeping platforms. The bed features colorful striped side panels in shades of orange, green, and beige, adding a playful touch. The upper bunk is equipped with several large, brightly colored pillows in orange, yellow, and green, as well as a laptop placed on the mattress. The lower bunk has a green cylindrical pillow and a closed book resting on the mattress. Both bunks have guardrails for safety, and a ladder is attached to the right side for access to the upper bunk. The overall design is functional and suitable for compact urban living spaces, such as apartments or dormitories.
description: A white metal bunk bed with colorful striped panels, large pillows, and a laptop on the upper bunk. The design is modern and playful, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upper bunk with colorful pillows and a laptop, and the lower bunk with a green pillow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the striped panels, the ladder, and the arrangement of pillows and objects on both bunks.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the pillows and the book on the lower bunk, with both bunks visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the ladder, the laptop on the upper bunk, and the book on the lower bunk.
